news.title:

news.title:

news.title:
Swiggy's monthly users grew 36.8% YoY to 24.3M; revenue up 50.8% YoY to ₹6431 Cr.
Food delivery GOV rose 20.5% YoY; quick commerce GOV surged 103.2% YoY to ₹7938 Cr.
news.summary:
Swiggy's monthly users grew 36.8% YoY to 24.3M; revenue up 50.8% YoY to ₹6431 Cr.
Food delivery GOV rose 20.5% YoY; quick commerce GOV surged 103.2% YoY to ₹7938 Cr.

news.title:
Swiggy Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M ending Dec 31, 2025, with a net loss of ₹1,065 crore for Q3.
Revenue rose to ₹6,244 crore in Q3, driven by operations like food delivery and quick commerce, but losses widened due to high expenses.
news.summary:
Swiggy Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M ending Dec 31, 2025, with a net loss of ₹1,065 crore for Q3.
Revenue rose to ₹6,244 crore in Q3, driven by operations like food delivery and quick commerce, but losses widened due to high expenses.

news.title:
Swiggy shares dropped 7.4%, hitting an intra-day low of 1,075.3 on BSE.
At 9:47 AM, Swiggy traded 2.8% higher at 1,049.1, while Sensex fell 0.6%.
news.summary:
Swiggy shares dropped 7.4%, hitting an intra-day low of 1,075.3 on BSE.
At 9:47 AM, Swiggy traded 2.8% higher at 1,049.1, while Sensex fell 0.6%.
